column1: # PURPOSE: measure σ of locked baseline at 2000 steps across seeds.
# This sweep adds 3 more seeds (42, 314, 7). With N=4 we get a real σ estimate.
# DECISION: σ ≤ 0.005 → keep single-seed knob work. σ > 0.005 → pivot to novel mechanisms + ensembling.
